# KOBOLD-CLASS SALVAGE SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-2
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Uranium
# Shuttle Brief
"A small, widely used vessel for profit mining, widely distributed, and mass produced, with small modifications."
"Manufactured by DIRE"

# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Spacefaring vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
